title: Custom Weapons
description: Custom  Weapons is a mod that adds more combat to Minecraft and silver ores. The silver can be made into strong and overpowered combat items.
body: A Mod that adds new weapons armor and enchantments to your game Check more details when playing the game ![custom weapons tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/011f757b2529444efbfb53397bedf879cc5247df.png) ## Description A new element called silver is added to minecraft. It can be found in the mines and maybe you will even find a geode of them. With silver you go from armor and weapons to projectiles! Silver is not only the only important thing added to the game, there are also enchantments and mobs to find. As updates go on, more stuff is added to the game. Good Luck and happy Adventuring!
